summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of ProFit Team Education Platform. All major features functional including authentication, user management, course management, progress tracking, and reporting systems.

design_issues.issue: React hydration warning with table structure - span elements inside tbody

passed_tests: Admin Dashboard loads with metric cards
User Management - Create distributor user (testfrontend@test.com / TestPass123!)
Course Management - Create new course successfully
Course Detail page loads with tabs and module management
Backend API - All 28 API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Authentication system working for all 3 roles
Course hierarchy (Course > Module > Video > Quiz) creation
Progress tracking and quiz submission working
Reports page with user selection working
